equal society

Our Scope & Work

We work with the willing — those ready to take an active role in their own health — to help them adopt lifestyles that prevent disease, restore vitality, and build lasting wellness and longevity.


Our approach is grounded in an evidence-based protocol that brings together diet, Yoga, and lifestyle modification. Using a traffic light system, we guide and support meaningful, sustainable behavior change anchored to our 21-point Health Building Guidelines.  Read the evidence here.

Whats your Lifestyle score ? Answer 21-point questions here .equal society

This protocol has shown real promise across a range of chronic conditions, including functional bowel disorders, hypertension, diabetes, menstrual disorders, migraines, and arthritis.


3-weeks of diligent practice can get you:

  • Better digestive health

  • Lower blood pressure, reducing reliance on medication.

  • Better sleep

  • Boost energy and immunity.


Is Lifestyle approach suitable for me ?

  • A whole of person healing, of body and mind.

  • Targets root cause of ill health 

  • You are in control - place, foods

  • Results based - better health, bio-markers

Message +91-9013103676 for a free assessment
